name: Prushko Plumbing
seoDescription: Prushko Plumbing is a family-owned plumbing, heating and air contractor in Glen Ellen, CA serving the Sonoma Valley since 1976 — repairs, water heaters, sewer

sections.heading: Family-owned Sonoma Valley plumbing since 1976
sections.subheading: Prushko Plumbing is a second-generation, family-owned plumber based in Glen Ellen, serving Sonoma, Glen Ellen and the Sonoma Valley with full plumbing service, water heaters, sewer, gas and remodel
badges: Serving Glen Ellen & the Sonoma Valley

items.description: Repair and replacement of tank and tankless water heaters.

items.description: Plumbing for remodels and new residential and commercial construction.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Prushko Plumbing and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

sections.heading: About Prushko Plumbing
body: Prushko Plumbing was started by Ron and Linda Prushko in Sonoma in 1976 and has served the Sonoma Valley as a family-owned and operated business for more than 40 years. When Ron retired in 2012, the family business passed to the next generation, keeping the same hands-on, neighbor-to-neighbor service the area has relied on for decades.

From everyday repairs, water heaters and drain work to sewer, gas lines, remodels and new construction, Prushko handles residential and commercial plumbing across Glen Ellen, Sonoma and the surrounding valley. The company is licensed under California contractor's license #384098.
highlights: Serving Glen Ellen & the Sonoma Valley
